basic_details.job_title: NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for 30 Posts
basic_details.organization_name: National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS)
basic_details.short_information: NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 has been announced by the National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS), New Delhi, inviting applications for 30 Research Associate posts across Medical, Non-Medical, IT, Finance & Accounts, Rajbhasha, Procurement, Estate, Travel Desk, Establishment, Editorial, Cyber Security, and Secretarial streams. Selection is purely through a Walk-in-Interaction to be held on 25, 27, and 28 July 2026 at the NBEMS office in Dwarka, New Delhi — there is no online application. Monthly consolidated remuneration ranges from ₹50,000 to ₹95,000, and posts ar

important_dates.raw: Notification release date: 01 July 2026 Walk-in-Interaction - Batch 1: 25 July 2026, reporting by 12:00 Noon (Research Associate-I Medical and Non-Medical) Walk-in-Interaction - Batch 2: 27 July 2026, reporting by 12:00 Noon (Cyber Security, IT, Finance & Accounts, Rajbhasha, Procurement, Estate) Walk-in-Interaction - Batch 3: 28 July 2026, reporting by 12:00 Noon (Travel Desk, Establishment, Editorial, Secretarial) | Candidates are advised to reach the venue well before the reporting time, since late arrivals may not be permitted for document verification and interaction.

application_fee.details: The official notification for this Walk-in-Interaction does not specify any application fee for Research Associate posts. Since this is a direct walk-in recruitment process and not an online application, candidates are advised to verify fee-related details, if any, on the official NBEMS website before attending the interaction.

Graduate in any discipline with good academic record; relevant certifications/diplomas an added advantage

Graduate in any discipline; IATA-related certifications an added advantage
Bachelor's degree from a recognized university

B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Cyber Security/IT or equivalent, or MCA/M.Sc in Electronics, Physics, Applied Electronics, Computer Science/IT; CISSP, CISM, CISA, or ISO 27001 Lead Implementer/Auditor certification preferred

No DA, HRA, or other government allowances apply, since these are contractual, non-regular positions. | Research Associate-I posts: ₹50,000/- per month (consolidated) Research Associate-II posts (Finance & Accounts, Cyber Security): ₹95,000/- per month (consolidated) Annual increment: up to 5% of remuneration as a ceiling, on satisfactory completion of one year, subject to a case-by-case performance review | Extension in each case is subject to the continued requirement of the post at NBEMS and satisfactory performance evaluation by the reporting officer and Head of the Department. The engagement does not confer any right to regularization or permanent absorption.

how_to_apply: NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 does not have an online application mode. Follow these steps to apply through the Walk-in-Interaction:
Download the official notification and the prescribed application form from the NBEMS official website, natboard.edu.in.
Fill the application form in your own handwriting, in capital letters (except for the signature), on A4 size paper.
Paste a recent passport-size photograph on the form and sign it.
Attach self-attested copies of all educational, experience, category, and age-proof documents.
Report at the NBEMS Office, Sector-9, Opposite Dwarka District Court, Dwarka, New Delhi - 110075 (nearest Metro station: Dwarka Sector 10) by 12:00 Noon on the date scheduled for your post.
Carry all original documents for on-the-spot verification along with the filled application form.

content_sections.heading: NAT Board Research Associate Recruitment 2026 Overview

rows.details: National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS)
NBEMS Office, Sector-9, Opposite Dwarka District Court, Dwarka, New Delhi - 110075

content_sections.heading: NBEMS Research Associate Important Dates 2026
content_sections.text: Notification release date: 01 July 2026 Walk-in-Interaction - Batch 1: 25 July 2026, reporting by 12:00 Noon (Research Associate-I Medical and Non-Medical) Walk-in-Interaction - Batch 2: 27 July 2026, reporting by 12:00 Noon (Cyber Security, IT, Finance & Accounts, Rajbhasha, Procurement, Estate) Walk-in-Interaction - Batch 3: 28 July 2026, reporting by 12:00 Noon (Travel Desk, Establishment, Editorial, Secretarial) Candidates are advised to reach the venue well before the reporting time, since late arrivals may not be permitted for document verification and interaction.

content_sections.heading: NBEMS Research Associate Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: NBEMS has notified 30 posts of Research Associate-I and Research Associate-II across 12 different profiles. The post-wise vacancy break-up, remuneration, and age limit are given below. Of these, the Research Associate-I (Medical) post carries the highest number of vacancies at 12, with reservation of UR-05, OBC-03, SC-02, ST-01 and EWS-01 as per the official notification.

content_sections.heading: NBEMS Research Associate Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Eligibility for NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 varies post-wise and is based on educational qualification, relevant certifications, and post-qualification work experience. Candidates should check the specific requirements for the post they intend to apply for below.

rows.essential_qualification: MBBS / Bachelor of Dental Surgery (BDS) or equivalent
rows.experience_required: Desirable: experience in Government/Semi-Government organizations, Autonomous Bodies, or Educational/Examination Institutes

rows.essential_qualification: Graduation from a recognized university or equivalent, with Post-Graduation in any subject and knowledge of computers
rows.experience_required: 5 years' experience in Government/Semi-Government organizations, Autonomous Bodies, or Educational/Examination Institutes preferred

rows.essential_qualification: Graduate in Computer Applications / Information Technology / Computer Science / Artificial Intelligence / Operating Systems / Software Engineering or equivalent; preferred certifications include CCNA/CCNP/CCIE, Fortinet/Palo Alto/Checkpoint, RHCE/MCSE, Oracle/MS SQL/PostgreSQL DBA, CEH/OSCP, ITIL v4, and privacy/data-protection certifications
rows.experience_required: 3-5 years post-qualification experience in network security, system/database administration, application security, or cybersecurity operations

rows.essential_qualification: Qualified Chartered Accountant from ICAI, or CMA/CS from a recognized institute, or M.Com from a recognized university
rows.experience_required: 3 years' post-qualification experience in a reputed firm handling GST, TDS, Income Tax returns, Annual Accounts, and Investments

rows.essential_qualification: Master's degree with Hindi and English as compulsory/elective subjects or as medium of examination (multiple qualifying combinations); plus a diploma/certificate in Hindi-English translation or two years' translation experience in a Central/State Government office
Graduate in any discipline with good academic record; relevant certifications/diplomas an added advantage
rows.experience_required: Minimum 5 years' experience with at least 3 years in procurement and contract management; knowledge of GFR/CVC guidelines and RFP/RFQ/EOI processes

rows.essential_qualification: Graduate with a recognized PG Degree/Diploma in Estate/Facility/Infrastructure Management, or Bachelor's in Civil Engineering/Architecture/Real Estate/Facility Management
rows.experience_required: Minimum 7 years' post-qualification experience in estate/property/facility management, preferably in Government/Autonomous Bodies/PSUs

rows.essential_qualification: Graduate in any discipline; IATA-related certifications an added advantage
rows.experience_required: Minimum 5 years' experience in travel desk operations, airline ticketing, and travel management
Minimum 3 years' post-qualification experience, preferably in Government Departments/Autonomous Bodies/PSUs; knowledge of service rules, reservation roster, CCS Leave Rules, LTC, GPF, CPF, NPS, RTI

rows.essential_qualification: Bachelor's degree from a recognized university
rows.experience_required: Desirable: experience in publication in medical journals

rows.essential_qualification: B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/Cyber Security/IT or equivalent, or MCA/M.Sc in Electronics, Physics, Applied Electronics, Computer Science/IT; CISSP, CISM, CISA, or ISO 27001 Lead Implementer/Auditor certification preferred
rows.experience_required: 15 years' post-qualification experience in IT Systems, including 8 years in Information/Cyber Security in Government, Semi-Government, or large organizations
Minimum 3 years' post-qualification experience, preferably in Government Departments/Autonomous Bodies/PSUs

content_sections.heading: NBEMS Research Associate Salary / Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: Selected candidates will receive a lump-sum monthly consolidated remuneration as below, with statutory deductions made as applicable. No DA, HRA, or other government allowances apply, since these are contractual, non-regular positions. Research Associate-I posts: ₹50,000/- per month (consolidated) Research Associate-II posts (Finance & Accounts, Cyber Security): ₹95,000/- per month (consolidated) Annual increment: up to 5% of remuneration as a ceiling, on satisfactory completion of one year, subject to a case-by-case performance review Extension in each case is subject to the continued requirement of the post at NBEMS and satisfactory performance evaluation by the reporting officer and Head of the Department. The engagement does not confer any right to regularization or permanent absorption.

rows.extension: Extendable by 2 more years (1 year at a time)
Extendable by 4 more years (1 year at a time)

content_sections.heading: NBEMS Research Associate Application Fee 2026
content_sections.text: The official notification for this Walk-in-Interaction does not specify any application fee for Research Associate posts. Since this is a direct walk-in recruitment process and not an online application, candidates are advised to verify fee-related details, if any, on the official NBEMS website before attending the interaction.

content_sections.heading: NBEMS Research Associate Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: Selection for NBEMS Research Associate posts is made purely through a Walk-in-Interaction, with no separate online application stage. The process includes: Document verification of age, qualification, category, and experience certificates on the day of the Walk-in-Interaction Screening and interaction conducted by an Interaction Panel, at the panel's discretion NBEMS reserves the right to hold a written examination or fix its own additional criteria for shortlisting candidates Candidates found ineligible at any stage will have their candidature cancelled The decision of NBEMS in all matters relating to eligibility, scrutiny, and selection is final and binding on candidates.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for NBEMS Walk-in-Interaction
content_sections.text: Candidates must carry the duly filled application form along with original documents and photocopies in support of: Date of birth (age proof) Educational qualification certificates and mark sheets (10th, 12th, Graduation, Post-Graduation, professional qualification) Caste/category certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS/PwBD), where applicable Experience certificates from current and past employers Relevant professional certifications, if claimed A recent passport-size photograph (to be pasted on the application form) Valid photo identity proof

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026 does not have an online application mode. Follow these steps to apply through the Walk-in-Interaction: Download the official notification and the prescribed application form from the NBEMS official website, natboard.edu.in. Fill the application form in your own handwriting, in capital letters (except for the signature), on A4 size paper. Paste a recent passport-size photograph on the form and sign it. Attach self-attested copies of all educational, experience, category, and age-proof documents. Report at the NBEMS Office, Sector-9, Opposite Dwarka District Court, Dwarka, New Delhi - 110075 (nearest Metro station: Dwarka Sector 10) by 12:00 Noon on the date scheduled for your post. Carry all original documents for on-the-spot verification along with the filled application form.

faq.question: Q1. How many vacancies are there in NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: NBEMS has announced a total of 30 vacancies for Research Associate-I and Research Associate-II posts across 12 different profiles, including Medical, Non-Medical, IT, Finance & Accounts, Rajbhasha, Procurement, Estate, Travel Desk, Establishment, Editorial, Cyber Security, and Secretarial.

faq.question: Q2. What is the mode of application for NBEMS Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: There is no online application. Candidates must attend a Walk-in-Interaction with a duly filled application form and original documents.

faq.question: Q3. What are the Walk-in-Interaction dates for NBEMS Research Associate Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The Walk-in-Interaction is scheduled across three dates — 25 July 2026, 27 July 2026, and 28 July 2026 — with candidates required to report by 12:00 Noon, depending on the post applied for.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for NBEMS Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: The age limit is 40 years for Research Associate-I posts and 45 years for Research Associate-II posts. A 5-year age relaxation applies to candidates with a minimum of 3 years' experience in Examination Institutes.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary for NBEMS Research Associate posts?
faq.answer: Research Associate-I posts carry a consolidated monthly remuneration of ₹50,000/-, while Research Associate-II posts (Finance & Accounts and Cyber Security) carry ₹95,000/- per month, with up to a 5% annual increment ceiling.

faq.question: Q6. Where is the NBEMS Walk-in-Interaction venue located?
faq.answer: The venue is the NBEMS Office, Sector-9, Opposite Dwarka District Court, Dwarka, New Delhi – 110075. The nearest Metro station is Dwarka Sector 10.
